title: Anti-aircraft flak pod
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MOflakpod.jpg|thumb|right|Anti-aircraft flak pod]]
'''Anti-aircraft flak pods''' were a kind of homing explosive flak pod that were used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as ammunition for [[All Terrain Anti Aircraft/Legends|AT-AAs]]. Launching dozens of flak [[Missile/Legends|missiles]] in a scattered pattern to home in on enemy [[Starship/Legends|starships]], they proved very effective against aerial vehicles such as the [[T-47 airspeeder/Legends|T-47 airspeeder]], but were nearly useless against ground targets such as [[Infantry/Legends|infantry]], [[T2-B Repulsor Tank/Legends|T2-B repulsor tanks]], and other units.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
